funFacts: They communicate using pheromones—chemical scents that create invisible trails leading to food sources.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using acrylic or light watercolors.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
